scholarship_name: Institute tuition-fee remission: family income below INR 1 lakh
provider: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli / Government fee policy
benefit_description: Full remission of INR 62,500 tuition fee per semester across eight semesters, subject to valid income documentation. Amount shown is calculated maximum over four years.
duration: Up to 8 semesters, subject to documentation
required_documents: Parental income certificate for preceding financial year
renewal_conditions: Submit valid income certificate as directed

scholarship_name: Institute tuition-fee remission: family income INR 1-5 lakh
provider: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli / Government fee policy
benefit_description: Two-thirds remission of tuition: INR 41,667 per semester. Four-year benefit is calculated using eight semesters.
duration: Up to 8 semesters, subject to documentation
required_documents: Parental income certificate for preceding financial year
renewal_conditions: Submit valid income certificate as directed

duration: Second, third and fourth years subject to renewal
required_documents: Student ID; bank passbook; Class XII documents; JEE score/rank; first-year grade cards; school-location/government-school proof; income proof; essay; declarations
